action_taken: Gmail draft created to amosleblanc@gmail.com with fix instructions. Log committed to vossadvisory repo.
resolution_needed: Add BLUESKY_HANDLE and BLUESKY_APP_PASSWORD as environment variables in the Claude Code routine settings. Routine can then post via Bluesky HTTPS API with no SSH required. Bluesky App Password: Settings > Privacy and Security > App Passwords at bsky.app.
